## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant workflow checks passed or are explained
- [ ] Source-sensitive claims were verified against current authoritative references
- [ ] Cross-document consistency was checked when guidance overlaps another file

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue or explained why none was needed
- [ ] Updated planning state or changelog when the change affects project direction
- [ ] No sensitive details disclosed publicly
